problem id: f6a95641
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11001011 -> 10110010
  10100101 -> 10101001
  00000101 -> 10000001
  11110110 -> 00111101
  11110111 -> 10111101
  10110000 -> 00101100
  01100000 -> 00011000
  11001111 -> 10110011

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 10111001
